mnemonics: A Continuous Internal Ledger (CIL) - Think of CIE as a continuous internal ledger that constantly records and verifies progress, just like a blockchain.
keyPoints: CIE in blockchain education focuses on ongoing, practical assessment of a student's ability to understand and implement core concepts like smart contracts and consensus mechanisms.
It often involves building and auditing project milestones on a testnet, rather than a single final exam.
The evaluation is designed to mirror the continuous and immutable nature of blockchain verification itself.
commonMistakes: Confusing CIE with a traditional final exam; it is a series of assessments throughout the module.
Focusing only on theoretical knowledge and neglecting the practical, hands-on application required.
